researcher.name: Researcher
researcher.description: Deep research & analysis. Read-only for local files. No system writes.

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: Full access with safety rails for destructive tools.

social_engine.name: Social Engine
social_engine.description: Monitors logs to draft social posts. Locked out of system changes.

creative_writer.name: Creative Writer
creative_writer.description: Drafting and TTS focus. No search or shell access.

security_auditor.name: Security Auditor
security_auditor.description: Read-only access to system logs and status. No execution.

automation_bot.name: Automation Bot
automation_bot.description: Background task specialist. Restricted to session/subagent management.

kiosk_mode.name: Kiosk Mode
kiosk_mode.description: Public-facing restricted mode. Browser and Search only.

vault_keeper.name: Vault Keeper
vault_keeper.description: Memory management only. No external web access.

paranoid_mode.name: Paranoid Mode
paranoid_mode.description: Maximum lock. Every tool call requires explicit user confirmation.

data_cleaner.name: Data Cleaner
data_cleaner.description: File system & memory maintenance. No network access allowed.

observer.name: The Observer
observer.description: No tools allowed. Can only talk and process session history.

coding_apprentice.name: Coding Apprentice
coding_apprentice.description: Can read/write files and run tests, but cannot spawn subagents or use web.

it_support.name: IT Support
it_support.description: System status and shell access. No access to personal memory/vault.

story_teller.name: Story Teller
story_teller.description: Specialized for Canvas and TTS. Creative mode with no system access.

web_scout.name: Web Scout
web_scout.description: High-speed web crawling and browser automation only.

ghost_protocol.name: Ghost Protocol
ghost_protocol.description: Can send messages and bridge sessions but leaves no trace in local memory.

osint_stalker.name: OSINT Stalker
osint_stalker.description: Deep web intel gathering only. No system or memory access.

compliance_officer.name: Compliance Officer
compliance_officer.description: Audits session history and status but cannot act or modify.

triage_bot.name: Triage Bot
triage_bot.description: Monitors incoming messages and reacts, but cannot search or execute.

shadow_admin.name: Shadow Admin
shadow_admin.description: Full system control but explicitly denied access to messaging/external web.

librarian.name: Librarian
librarian.description: Specialized in organizing local files and memory. No shell or web.

air_gap_architect.name: Air-Gap Architect
air_gap_architect.description: Creation/Editing allowed, but strictly no network or sub-session tools.

forensics_agent.name: Forensics Agent
forensics_agent.description: Replays history and grep logs. Cannot write or send anything.

dispatcher.name: Dispatcher
dispatcher.description: Manages subagents and sessions. No file access or browser allowed.

ui_vibe_coder.name: UI Vibe Coder
ui_vibe_coder.description: Canvas and Browser focus for UI/UX work. Restricted shell access.

minimalist.name: The Minimalist
minimalist.description: Only 'read' and 'message' enabled for basic assistant duties.

data_journalist.name: Data Journalist
data_journalist.description: Brave Search and PDF analysis for fact-checking. No execution.

janitor.name: Janitor
janitor.description: Can read/write but only for system cleanup tasks. No web.

creative_director.name: Creative Director
creative_director.description: TTS, Canvas, and Message focus for managing content flow.

vault_auditor.name: Vault Auditor
vault_auditor.description: Exclusively monitors long-term memory changes. No shell.

web_harvester.name: Web Harvester
web_harvester.description: High-volume web fetch and pdf extraction. Restricted message access.

sandbox_shell.name: Sandbox Shell
sandbox_shell.description: Exec only mode. Locked out of files, web, and memory.

session_navigator.name: Session Navigator
session_navigator.description: Manages history and list but cannot send messages or search.

content_refinery.name: Content Refinery
content_refinery.description: Refines local text files and drafts. No external connectivity.

mcp_tester.name: MCP Tester
mcp_tester.description: Browser and exec focus for testing new MCP servers. No memory access.

guardian.name: The Guardian
guardian.description: Security-focused. Monitors status and audit tools. Confirm required for all.

viral_thread_crafter.name: Viral Thread Crafter
viral_thread_crafter.description: Social media specialist. High-speed research + drafting tools only.

investigative_reporter.name: Investigative Reporter
investigative_reporter.description: Deep archival research focus (PDF, Search, LCM) with zero system-write access.

multi_platform_broadcaster.name: Multi-Platform Broadcaster
multi_platform_broadcaster.description: Cross-channel message routing and session management. No file manipulation.
